resources.string: Choose what happens when swiping an episode in a list
Enable swipe actions for this screen
Include duration of episodes that are just marked as played
Notice: Playback speed is never taken into account.
This will erase the history of duration played for all episodes. Are you sure you want to proceed?
No skip data yet. Start listening to build up your stats.
You already played all recent episodes. Nothing to be surprised here ;)
You can add episodes by downloading them or long-pressing them and selecting \"Add to queue\".
New episodes will show up here. You can then decide whether you are interested in them.
You can download any episode to listen to it offline.
Bring your shows from Spotify, Apple Podcasts, Podcast Addict and more — or start fresh and find a new one.
Press play. We listen for the intro, ads, and outro — and skip them for you.

plurals.name: total_size_downloaded_podcasts
plurals.item: Total size of %d episode on the device
Total size of %d episodes on the device

resources.string: Sort by number of played episodes
Number of episodes in the inbox
Number of downloaded and unplayed episodes
Detailed logs may contain sensitive information, such as your subscriptions list
This will clear the entire playback history. Are you sure you want to proceed?
Turn volume for episodes of this podcast up or down: %1$s
Automatic download enabled. Episodes are added to the inbox and then moved to the queue once downloaded.
Show a notification when a new episode is released
Please confirm that you want to remove all from the inbox.
Please confirm that you want to mark all selected items as played.
Please confirm that you want to mark all selected items as unplayed.
Deleting will remove ALL its episodes including downloads, playback history, and statistics.
Archiving will hide it from the subscription list and avoid it getting updates. Downloads, statistics and playback state are kept.
Multi select actions shown at the bottom
Last refresh failed. Tap to view details.
Please wait some time before refreshing podcasts again.
Please wait until the data is loaded
Please confirm that you want to delete the tag \"%1$s\".
Refreshing podcasts over mobile data connection is disabled in the settings.\n\nDo you want to refresh anyway?

Your VPN app pretends to be a mobile network (metered connection). Refreshing podcasts over mobile data connection is disabled in the settings.\n\nDo you want to refresh anyway? If you want this problem to be fixed, contact the creators of your VPN app.
Please confirm that you want to delete all played downloads.
To jump to positions, you need to play the episode
Please make sure that you trust the website \"%1$s\".
Deleting removes the episode from TrimPlayer and deletes the media file from your device storage. It cannot be downloaded again through TrimPlayer.
Download of \"%1$s\" failed. Will be retried later.
There is not enough space left on your device.
The podcast host\'s server sent a broken podcast feed. We recommend checking with a podcast validator such as castfeedvalidator.com and contacting the podcast creator to let them know.
The podcast host\'s server sent a website, not a podcast.
The address you entered is a website address, not a podcast RSS address.
The podcast host\'s server does not know where to find the file. It may have been deleted.
Cannot find the server. Check if the address is typed correctly and if you have a working network connection.
Authentication error. Make sure that username and password are correct.
The podcast host\'s server refuses to respond.
The server connection was lost before completing the download
The download was blocked by another app on your device (like a VPN or ad blocker).
Unable to establish a secure connection. This can mean that another app on your device (like a VPN or an ad blocker) blocked the download, or that something is wrong with the server certificates.
The link you tapped does not contain a valid podcast URL. Please verify the link and try again, or search for the podcast manually.
The suggested podcast did not have an RSS link, TrimPlayer found a podcast that could match
Downloading over mobile data connection is disabled in the settings. TrimPlayer can download the episode later automatically when Wi-Fi is available.

- Using a VPN? Your VPN app pretends to be a mobile network (metered connection). If you want this problem fixed, contact the creators of your VPN app.\n- Not using a VPN? Open the Android Wi-Fi settings and change the type of your Wi-Fi to not be metered.

plurals.name: mobile_download_notice
plurals.item: Downloading over mobile data connection for the next %d minute
Downloading over mobile data connection for the next %d minutes

resources.string: Streaming over mobile data connection is disabled in the settings. Tap to stream anyway.

The media file could not be played.

- Try deleting and re-downloading the episode.
- Check your network connection, and make sure no VPN or login page is blocking access.
- Try long-pressing and sharing the "Media address" to your web browser to see if it can be played there. If not, contact the podcast creators.
Item does not contain a media file
If you lock the queue, you can no longer swipe or reorder episodes.
Please confirm that you want to remove ALL episodes from the queue.
%1$.2fx is already saved as a preset.
Add an episode by downloading it, or long press an episode and select \"Add to queue\".
No episodes lined up, but there are new episodes that await you!
You can download episodes on the podcast details screen.
Download logs will appear here when available.
After you listen to an episode, it will appear here.
When you add a podcast, the episodes will be shown here.
Try clearing the filter to see more episodes.
When new episodes arrive, they will be shown here. You can then decide if you are interested in them or not.
To subscribe to a podcast, press the plus icon below.
You can archive podcasts from the main subscriptions screen.
Episodes that should be eligible for removal if Auto Download needs space for new episodes
Pause playback when headphones or Bluetooth devices get disconnected
Resume playback when the headphones get reconnected
Jump to next queue item when playback completes
Delete episodes after playing or when automatic download needs space
Include local folders in Auto delete functionality
Note that for local folders this will remove episodes from TrimPlayer and delete their media files from your device storage. They cannot be downloaded again through TrimPlayer. Enable auto delete?
Mark episodes as played even if less than a certain amount of seconds of playing time is still left
Keep episodes when they are skipped
Keep episodes when they are marked favorite
Update interval, Mobile data, Automatic download, Automatic deletion
Specify an interval at which TrimPlayer looks for new episodes automatically
Display stream button instead of download button in lists
Select what should be allowed over the mobile data connection
Use full black for the dark theme
Adapt app colors based on the wallpaper
Access the most important screens from everywhere, in a single tap
Change which items appear in the navigation drawer or bottom navigation
Automatically download episodes from the inbox. Can be overridden per podcast.
Configure the automatic download of episodes
Allow automatic download when the battery is not charging
Automatic download is stopped if this number is reached
Use the episode specific cover in lists whenever available. If unchecked, the app will always use the podcast cover image.
Display remaining time of episodes when checked. If unchecked, display total duration of episodes.
Customize the speeds available for variable speed playback
The speed to use when starting audio playback for episodes in this podcast
Outro & ads will skip once it\'s ready.
Outro & ads will skip on their own.
TrimPlayer found nothing to skip on this one.
Play it back and drag the edges to fix where it starts and ends, change the label, or remove it.
Tap a skip to adjust its edges or remove it.
Nothing trimmed in this episode yet.
Auto-skip detected intro music and host openings
Auto-skip detected ad reads and sponsor breaks
Auto-skip detected outro music and end-of-episode wrap-up
Episodes you mark with a star show up here.
Bookmark a moment from the player to find it here.
Tap a bookmark to jump back to that moment.
No bookmarks in this episode yet.
TrimPlayer is free — chip in to keep it running
Log in to sync your queue and progress to the web player
Sign in to sync your library across devices.
One account syncs your podcasts everywhere.
Signed in — your library will sync shortly
Google sign-in isn\'t available right now
No Google account found on this device. Add one in Settings, then try again.
Couldn\'t sign in with Google. Please try again.
Open TRIM Player on your Garmin watch and enter the code shown on its sign-in screen.
Your queue is empty — queue some episodes first.
%1$d episode(s) will sync to the watch
The whole queue will sync to the watch
Couldn\'t save the selection. Please try again.
The watch will be signed out and stop syncing episodes. You can link it again anytime with a new code.
Watch unlinked — it will return to sign-in
Sending the request to your watch…
Request delivered ✓\n\nWaiting for the watch to send its progress…
No paired Garmin watch found.\n\nPair your watch in the Garmin Connect app first, then try again.
Garmin Connect isn\'t available on this phone.\n\nInstall and set up the Garmin Connect app, then restart TrimPlayer.

Couldn\'t deliver the request to the watch.\n\nOpen TRIM Player on the watch (Music → Music Providers → TRIM Player), keep it on screen, and try again. Progress also syncs automatically when you pause playback on the watch.

plurals.name: trim_account_pull_watch_progress_received
plurals.item: Received %d episode update from the watch. Playback positions are up to date — episodes will resume past what you already heard.
Received %d episode updates from the watch. Playback positions are up to date — episodes will resume past what you already heard.

resources.string: The watch replied, but it had no new listening progress to report.
The watch sent a report, but applying it failed. Please try again.
No reply from the watch after 30 seconds.\n\nMake sure TRIM Player is open on the watch and your phone\'s Garmin Connect app is connected, then try again.
Watch linked — it will finish signing in on its own
You\'ve used all %1$d free auto-trims this month. Upgrade to TrimPlayer Pro for unlimited auto-trim on every episode.
Everything in TrimPlayer is free — every feature, no limits, no locked extras. If it has saved you time, you can chip in to help keep it running.
TrimPlayer has saved you %1$s by skipping intros, ads, outros, and silence.
Play a few episodes and the time TrimPlayer saves you will start adding up here.
Every feature is already unlocked for everyone. These are optional subscriptions that help cover servers and development — thank you for chipping in. ♥
Same Pro features as the yearly plan. The extra $30 helps fund development and infra. You\'ll get a permanent Supporter badge and our thanks.
Thank you for supporting TrimPlayer — your contribution keeps the project running.
In-app purchase isn\'t wired up yet — coming soon.
Your first Supporter Digest arrives at the end of your first full month.
Couldn\'t load the digest. Pull-to-refresh or try later.
Thanks for using TrimPlayer in beta. You get 6 months of Pro on us — unlimited auto-trim, no strings attached.
Adjust media info to playback speed
Displayed position and duration are adapted to playback speed
Customize the number of seconds to jump forward when the fast-forward button is clicked
Customize the number of seconds to jump backwards when the rewind button is clicked
This usually expands the notification to show playback buttons.
Keep notification and lockscreen controls when playback is paused
You must select exactly two items
Change the buttons on the playback notification
Address of the TrimPlayer ad-detection backend (e.g. http://192.168.1.5:8000/api/v1/)
Add downloaded episodes to the queue
Screen that is opened when starting TrimPlayer
Pressing the back button on the default page opens the navigation drawer
Automatically remove an episode from the queue when it is deleted
Display play button instead of delete button on downloads screen
This setting is unique to each podcast. You can change it by opening the podcast page.
Action to take for new episodes
Tell us what happened, what you wish worked differently, or anything else. We read every message and reply right here in the app.
A real human reads every message. Reply lands right here in the app.
What happened, what you expected, what you\'d love to see…
Helps us reproduce. Version + model, no personal data.
The stack trace from when it broke.
Got it — we\'ll reply right here.
Couldn\'t send right now. Check your connection and try again.
A few words so we can help?
Nothing yet. Whatever you send lands here — and so does our reply.
It\'ll disappear from your inbox. We still keep your original message in case it helps us improve.
Couldn\'t delete just now. Check your connection and try again.
%1$s listeners saved %2$s of ads, silence and filler.
You\'ve saved %1$s of ads, silence and filler.
Your bar; the tick marks the nation\'s average.
We only ever add up trimmed seconds — never who listened to what.
Be one of the first. Every ad you skip from here on adds to the nation\'s tally.
Couldn\'t create the share image. Please try again.
TrimPlayer listeners have clawed back %1$s from ads, silence and filler. I\'ve personally cut %2$s of it. Come take your time back:
I\'ve clawed back %1$s from ads, silence and filler with TrimPlayer. Come take your time back:
Everyone can help to make TrimPlayer better - with code, translations or by helping users in our forum
Based on AntennaPod · open source under GPL-3.0
Move subscriptions and queue to another device
Transfer your subscriptions to another podcast app
Import your subscriptions from another podcast app
Import TrimPlayer database from another device
An error has occurred while reading the file. Make sure that you have actually selected an OPML file and that the file is valid.
Export subscriptions, episode state, queue, and preferences in the open PortCast format (portcast.org)
Importing %1$d feeds in the background. %2$d couldn\'t be matched and were skipped.
Import %1$d shows? Episode state for %2$d episodes — resume points, played status, favorites, and queue order — will be applied where available.
%1$d shows couldn\'t be matched and will be skipped. Re-run the import after subscribing to them manually if needed.
%1$d episodes have local play data. You\'ll be asked to review each one before importing.
Move your followed shows and resume positions from Spotify to TrimPlayer.

Sign in to Spotify here and TrimPlayer will fetch your library directly. If you already have a .portcast.json file from a desktop tool, tap "I have a PortCast file" instead.

What gets imported:
 • Followed shows
 • Resume positions for saved episodes

Spotify doesn't expose play history, so completed-episode marks aren't carried over.
Sign in to Spotify, then open Your Library.
You\'re not signed in to Spotify in this view. Sign in above, then tap Fetch library again.

Google, Facebook, and Apple block their sign-in inside embedded browsers like this one — that\'s why \"Continue with Google\" leads to a loop.\n\nUse your Spotify email and password instead. If you signed up with Google or Facebook, you can set a password at accounts.spotify.com in your normal browser, then come back here.
%1$d of %2$d will use %3$s · Toggle right = use %3$s
Importing a database will replace all of your current subscriptions and playing history. Do you want to replace?

You already have subscriptions in TrimPlayer. How do you want to apply this backup?

• Merge keeps your current library and adds the backup's shows, history, queue and favorites on top. Only episodes the feeds still publish can be restored.

• Full restore replaces everything currently in TrimPlayer with the backup — including episodes the feeds no longer publish. Your current library is wiped.
Most apps make you start from scratch. We don\'t — from any app.
Press play — we skip the intros, ads, and outros automatically.
Subscriptions and your exact place in every episode. Yes, that\'s allowed.
Your subs, your place in every episode, even your queue — not just a list.
We\'re built on AntennaPod, so we read its backup whole — history and all.
The open format. Everything moves, nothing\'s lost. (We wrote it.)
Pocket Casts, Overcast, Castro — bring your subscriptions in one tap (OPML). It\'s all the others let you take. We\'ll let you take more.
Bring your shows from Spotify, Apple Podcasts, Podcast Addict, and more
I\'ve made my backup — choose file
I already have my backup file
First make a backup inside Podcast Addict (about a minute) — then just Share it to TrimPlayer and your library imports automatically.
Prefer to do it by hand? The backup is a .backup file (named PodcastAddict_….backup) in your Podcasts folder — tap “choose file” below and pick it.

string-array.name: migration_guide_podcast_addict_steps
string-array.item: In Podcast Addict, open the menu and tap the gear (Settings) at the bottom.
Tap the green BACK UP button and wait for it to finish.
On the “Backup” pop-up, tap SHARE and choose TrimPlayer — your shows import automatically, no need to come back.

resources.string: Export your whole library from AntennaPod — subscriptions, listened episodes and queue — then Share it to TrimPlayer and it imports automatically.
Prefer to do it by hand? The export is a .db file (named AntennaPodBackup-….db) saved where you chose — tap “choose file” below and pick it.

string-array.name: migration_guide_antennapod_steps
string-array.item: In AntennaPod, open the menu (More) and tap Settings.
Tap Database export — this includes your subscriptions, listened episodes and queue.
Choose where to save and tap SAVE.
On the “Export successful” message, tap Share and choose TrimPlayer — your library imports automatically, no need to come back.

resources.string: Less to sit through, every episode.
Your shows are on the way
We\'re pulling in your subscriptions and your exact place in every episode. Your progress is safe — we never rewind you.
And the moment you press play, we start skipping the intros, ads, and outros for you — automatically.
Pick your first show — we\'ll skip the boring intros and ads for you.
Access to external storage is required to read the OPML file
Please press OK to restart TrimPlayer
This database was exported with a newer version of TrimPlayer. Your current installation does not yet know how to handle this file.
The selected file is not a valid TrimPlayer database backup. Please select a .db file exported from TrimPlayer.
Import subscriptions, playback history, or a full backup — file type is detected automatically
File format not recognized. Supported formats: OPML (.opml, .xml), TrimPlayer database (.db), Podcast Addict backup (.zip).
Migrate subscriptions and episode states from a Podcast Addict backup file
Imported %1$d feeds and %2$d episode states. Feed refresh started — episode states will be applied in the background.
Import started in the background — you can keep using the app. %1$d feeds will appear in your subscriptions as they\'re added.
%1$d of %2$d episodes will use Podcast Addict · Toggle right = use Podcast Addict
Instead of always automatically enabling the sleep timer with one episode, please instead disable \"continuous playback\" in the settings.
Invalid input, time has to be an integer

plurals.name: timer_exceeds_remaining_time_while_continuous_playback_disabled
plurals.item: Continuous playback is disabled and the current episode has only %1$d minute left
Continuous playback is disabled and the current episode has only %1$d minutes left

resources.string: Continuous playback is disabled in the settings. Always stopping at the end of the episode.

plurals.name: episodes_sleep_timer_exceeds_queue
plurals.item: There are %1$d episodes left in your queue
There is only %1$d episode left in your queue
There are only %1$d episodes left in your queue

resources.string: Automatically activate the sleep timer when pressing play
Automatically activate the sleep timer when pressing play between %1$s and %2$s
You can choose from multiple providers to synchronize your subscriptions and episode play state with
Gpodder.net is an open-source podcast synchronization service that you can install on your own server. Gpodder.net is independent of the TrimPlayer project.
Gpodder Sync is an open-source Nextcloud app that you can easily install on your own server. Gpodder Sync is independent of the TrimPlayer project.
You can pick your own server to synchronize with. When you have identified your preferred synchronization server, please enter its address here.
Grant access using the opened web browser and come back to TrimPlayer.
Please provide the credentials of your account on the synchronization server.
Password and data are not encrypted!
Please select the device that you created on the synchronization server or create a new one.
Congratulations! Your gpodder.net account is now linked with your device. TrimPlayer will from now on automatically sync subscriptions on your device with your gpodder.net account.
Change the login information for your gpodder.net account.
Synchronize subscription and episode state changes
Re-synchronize all subscriptions and episode states
Logged in as %1$s on %2$s.\n\nYou can choose your synchronization provider again once you have logged out.
Usernames may only contain letters, digits, hyphens and underscores.

Unable to log into your Nextcloud.

- Check your network connection.
- Confirm that you are using the correct server address.
- Make sure that the Gpodder Sync Nextcloud plugin is installed.
Please choose the base of your data folder. TrimPlayer will create the appropriate subdirectories.
Pause playback instead of lowering volume when another app wants to play sounds
Pause playback when the device volume is muted, resume when unmuted
Since %1$s, you played %2$s%3$d%4$s hours of podcasts.
Want to join? Whether you want to translate, support, design or code, we would be happy to have you!
Enjoying TrimPlayer? Share your appreciation by leaving a nice rating.
You are not subscribed to this podcast yet. Subscribe for free to access it more easily and keep its playback history.
Change your username and password for this podcast and its episodes
Change the tags of this podcast to help organize your subscriptions
Only common tags from all selected subscriptions are shown. Other tags stay unaffected.
Automatically download episodes from the inbox
List of terms used to decide if an episode should be included or excluded when auto downloading
Exclude episodes containing any of the terms below
Include only episodes containing any of the terms below
Include this podcast when (auto-)refreshing all podcasts
saved by skipping ads, intros & outros

Changing the RSS address can easily break the playback state and episode listings of the podcast. We do NOT recommend changing it and will NOT provide support if anything goes wrong. This cannot be undone. The broken subscription CANNOT be repaired by simply changing the address back. We recommend creating a backup before continuing.
In case of permission denials, you can use this to re-connect to the exact same folder. Do not select another folder.
This virtual podcast was created by adding a folder to TrimPlayer.
Unable to start system file manager
Shared via TrimPlayer — open in the app:
Opens in the TrimPlayer app — or the web player for anyone without it.
1.00× is the default speed and can\'t be removed.
Host is not a valid IP address or domain
Shown if your action is required, for example if you need to enter a password.
Shown while checking for new episodes.
Allows to control playback. This is the main notification you see while playing a podcast.
Shown when download or feed update fails.
Shown when a new episode of a podcast was found, where notifications are enabled
Looks like you stream a lot. Do you want episode lists to show stream buttons?
Looks like you download a lot. Do you want episode lists to show download buttons?
Your top podcasts and stats from the past year. Exclusively on your phone.
And you\'re ready to make a clean start of the year. You have
And you still have quite a bit to go this year. You have

plurals.name: echo_queue_hours_waiting
plurals.item: hours waiting in your queue\nfrom %1$d episode
hours waiting in your queue\nfrom %1$d episodes

resources.string: That\'s about %1$s each day until %2$d starts.
That\'s about %1$s each day until %2$d starts. You can start the year clean if you skip a few episodes.
That\'s about %1$s each day until %2$d starts. Wait, what?
Here\'s an insight: how quickly did you listen to episodes after they were released?
Typically, you completed an episode %1$s after it was released.
Another insight: did you actually listen to the podcasts you\'re subscribed to?
Looking at the numbers, you might be a hoarder
Numbers don\'t lie, they say. And with only %1$d%% of your %2$d active subscriptions having been played this year, that\'s probably fair.
You\'ve played episodes from %1$d%% of your %2$d active subscriptions this year. How about checking out \"%3$s\" again?
You\'ve played episodes from %1$d%% of your %2$d active subscriptions this year. Impressively organized listening habits!
for another great year with TrimPlayer!\n\nYour first episode was in %1$s. Here\'s to saving even more time next year!
for joining TrimPlayer this year!\n\nWhether you moved from another app or started fresh — it\'s great to help you skip the fluff and get to the good stuff!
Now, let\'s take a look at your favorite podcasts…
My year %d in podcasts 🎧 #TrimPlayerEcho\nSee your own listening wrapped with TrimPlayer:
As you listen, TrimPlayer auto-skips intros, outros, ads, and silence. The time you reclaim will show up here.
Subscribe to some shows first — checked shows will drop their new episodes into this playlist automatically.
Create a playlist to group episodes and play them one after another.
Delete the playlist \"%1$s\"? The episodes themselves are not deleted.
